Title: Time Management Audit
Description: Assess how effectively you manage your time and energy, and pinpoint the habits or systems to improve first.
SchemaJson: {"id":"time_management_audit_v1","title":"Time Management Audit","version":"1.0","questions":[{"id":"q1","type":"rating","label":"How satisfied are you with the way you currently manage your time at work?","min":1,"max":5,"required":true},{"id":"q2","type":"choice","label":"Which time management challenge resonates with you most?","options":["Too many meetings","Constant interruptions and notifications","Difficulty prioritising tasks","Procrastination","Saying yes to too many things"],"required":true},{"id":"q3","type":"choice","label":"Do you use a formal productivity or task management system?","options":["Yes, consistently","I have tried a few but nothing sticks","I use a basic to-do list","No system — I rely on memory"],"required":true},{"id":"q4","type":"rating","label":"How often do you complete your most important task before midday?","min":1,"max":5,"required":true},{"id":"q5","type":"text","label":"Describe your typical morning at work — how do you decide what to focus on first?","required":false}]}
